lanes.name: MYOB / Morpheus current finance API
lanes.status: confirmed broader read-only connector / some GL forms permission-blocked
lanes.coverage: Recent MYOB era; confirmed Account, JournalTransaction, Customer, Vendor, Bill, Invoice, Payment plus benefits-tracker account 312510
lanes.role: Current MYOB Advanced read-only extraction can seed chart of accounts, journal samples, AR/AP objects and payments. Financial statement engine still needs TrialBalance/Ledger/FinancialPeriod/Subaccount rights or alternate report endpoints.
lanes.next: Turn broad cache into entity cash/P&L source objects where possible; request/enable read-only rights for Ledger, TrialBalance, FinancialPeriod and Subaccount or locate equivalent report endpoints.
source_truth: Accessible endpoints confirmed: Account, JournalTransaction, Customer, Vendor, Bill, Invoice, Payment
lanes.risk: This proves broader MYOB read access, but Ledger/TrialBalance/FinancialPeriod/Subaccount are currently permission-blocked, so full financial statement extraction is not complete.

lanes.name: SUN legacy finance history
lanes.coverage: Pre-MYOB historical finance; long-run GL and function history
lanes.role: Older GL, field/function staff-cost history, entity results, budget-vs-actual history before MYOB.
lanes.next: Locate or request complete SUN exports: chart/accounts, periods, entities, departments/functions, journals, budgets, trial balances, P&L/balance sheet outputs.
source_truth: Trial Balance / Caseware files across SNC/SNU/SNE/schools
SUN to MYOB migration/reconciliation files from 2025
lanes.risk: Without SUN, long-run trends will be stitched from reports rather than source ledger.

lanes.name: Velixo / Excel management workbooks
lanes.coverage: Budget/spend dashboards, May 2026 operating graph, department workbooks
lanes.role: Fast source for existing dashboards, budgets, February/May actuals, cash sections, department/function summaries.
lanes.next: Create a workbook index that maps every dashboard metric to workbook/sheet/cell/period.
lanes.risk: Workbook extracts can mix periods/bases unless every figure carries source metadata.

lanes.name: Payroll / staff cost history
lanes.coverage: Payroll person-by-FY, current allocation overrides and staff-role mapping
lanes.role: People cost, office/staffing models, Ministry Field Map cost layer, funding-offset checks.
lanes.next: Add explicit funding-offset, remote-worker and entity-benefit fields; reconstruct older people history from SUN/session/email evidence.
lanes.risk: FY2023-24+ only; older headcount must not be inferred without evidence.

lanes.name: Constituency/session published reports
lanes.role: Member-reportable historical trend spine and published-claims source lane.
lanes.next: Targeted extraction of tithe, membership, entity finance, school, AAV, property/loan and staffing claims with page/slide references.
lanes.risk: Published claims are not ledger truth; use Investigations Layer to challenge where needed.
lanes.confidence: high for catalogue, low/medium for extracted metrics until parsed

lanes.name: Email intelligence / attachment text
lanes.coverage: About 89,000 emails; about 42,000 extracted attachment texts at last generation
lanes.role: Investigations Layer, source citations, person/org history, contradictions, approvals and context behind financial decisions.
lanes.next: Wire the Email Intelligence page into claim cards so every weak source can launch a targeted search packet.
lanes.risk: Email evidence is context/support, not automatically authoritative finance truth.
